name: Lemon Bundt Cake in Jars
recipeIngredient: 1 small pkg instant lemon pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
This is my "signature" cake. I've made it under various conditions, including gas cookers in London and high altitudes with no issues. The changes to reduce fat are noted in parentheses. Use any non-pudding cake mix; less oil if desired (1/8–¼ cup).
Beat together until batter is smooth.
Fill bundt pan sprayed with Pam or 4–6 greased Mason jars half full with batter. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. Test at 35 minutes using a bamboo skewer; the cake should rise, turn brown, and pull away from jar sides.
Remove immediately onto serving plates (without removing cakes). Frost with icing made of powdered sugar, grated lemon rind, and orange juice to desired consistency. Spoon over tops and reseal.
This recipe is easy and delicious, taking about one hour total.
